title: Amtech K0400 Combination Spanner Set, Drop Forged and Chrome Plated Spanners, 6mm to 19mm
features: DURABLE: This 11 piece combination spanner set is made from strong, drop forged, chrome plated steel with polished heads
POPULAR SIZES: The set includes popular sizes between 6mm - 19mm and comes in a handy storage wallet
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Amtech K0400 Spanner Set Ideal for both professionals, odd-jobbers, and household workers The Amtech Combination Spanner Set offers you 11 different sized spanners, in a compact foldable storage pouch that’s easy to put away when not in use. The sizes vary from 6mm to 19 mm. With two different heads per spanner - one with open-ended head, the other is the ring-type head – this is the ultimate spanner kit for any first-time homeowner. Drop forged and chrome plated, the Amtech Combination Spanner Set is both durable and protected against corrosion. Drop Forged And Chrome Plated Polished Heads Set Includes Sizes 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 17 And 19Mm Complete With Handy Storage Wallet
